subcodes.title: Words spoken in Vienna on 1913-04-19
subcodes.first_line: Your love is the reason I have come here. I have come to see you, not to go on leisurely excursions
subcodes.first_line_orig: محبّت شما سبب آمدن من باینجا شد من برای دیدن شما آمدم نه برای سیر و سیاحت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @being a source of light; guidance, @unity of thought and belief, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity
